name: ITPS205 Midterm Topic 1 - HTML & CSS Reca

questions.questionText: What are the Big 3 in Web Development?

In CSS, what do you call x?

x { property: value }

In CSS, what do you call x?

selector { x: value }

In CSS, what do you call x?

selector { property: x }
What model in HTML and CSS has padding, margin to combined spacing?
Tags that clearly describe their meaning or purpose both to the browser and to the developer.

name: ITPS205 Midterm Topic 2 - Introduction to JavaScript

questions.questionText: Programming Language of the Web.
4 Methods to generate output in JavaScript.
What is the official name of JavaScript?
JavaScript is an extension of Java? (True or False)
JavaScript Statements are composed of what? (5 Items)
What can JavaScript do? (5 Items)
questions.answer: Change HTML Content, Change Attribute Values, Change CSS, Hide HTML Element, Show HTML Element

name: ITPS205 Midterm Topic 3 - JavaScript Syntax & Structure

questions.questionText: Rules how programs must be constructed.
Refers to how code is organized in a program.
2 Types of Values.
Types of value that are fixed.
Types of value that are containers for storing data values.
4 ways to declare variables in JavaScript.
2 modern ways to declare JavaScript variables.
2 older ways to declare JavaScript variables.
Variables must be identified with _________ names.
Used to add descriptive text within the code that is not executed by the browser.
3 types of JavaScript comments.
Specify the kind of value a variable can hold.
An operator that returns the type of variable or an expression.
Symbols or keywords used to perform operations on values and variables.
Operators that perform mathematical calculations like addition, subtraction, etc...
Operators that compare two values and return a Boolean value.
Operators that are mainly used to perform the logical operations that determine the equality or difference between the values.
Operators that perform operations on binary representation of numbers.
Operator that is shorthand for conditional statements.
Operators that combine the rightmost operand.
Operate on a single operand.
Used to compare its operands and determine the relationship between them.
Operators that allow calculations with numbers beyond the safe integer range.
Operator that includes concatenation and concatenation assignment.

name: ITPS205 Midterm Topic 4 - Arrays and Objects

questions.questionText: Used to store multiple values in a single variable, instead of declaring separate variables for each value.
Used to make decisions in a program based on a given conditions.
A control structure that allows a program to make a decision.
A control structure used together with an if statement.
A conditional control flow mechanism used to perform different actions based on the value of a single expression.
Switch uses ______ ________ of matching the same type.
In JavaScript, ________________ are variables that belong to an object and store information about that object.
___________ are functions that belong to an object and define actions the object can perform.
